name: Reuters News API
what_it_does: Delivers real-time Reuters wire service content including breaking news, editorial articles, and multimedia for professional media and financial applications.
use_cases: Real-time breaking news feeds for financial terminals
Editorial content syndication for media companies
not_for: Startups or individual developers (enterprise pricing only)
Casual news aggregation or personal projects
Applications requiring broad multi-source coverage beyond Reuters
best_when: Building professional-grade financial or media platforms that require authoritative, real-time wire service content with guaranteed SLAs.
avoid_when: You need affordable access, broad multi-source coverage, or are in early-stage development without enterprise budget.

auth.notes: Enterprise auth with OAuth2 and scoped access; credentials provisioned through account management

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise custom pricing; typically five-figure annual contracts
pricing.notes: Pricing not publicly listed; requires sales engagement; targeted at media companies and financial institutions

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Enterprise-grade structured error responses; detailed error codes provided to enterprise customers
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only news data; all GET requests are idempotent
known_agent_gotchas: Public documentation is sparse; full API docs only available post-contract
High barrier to entry makes agent prototyping and testing difficult
Enterprise onboarding adds weeks of lead time before agents can integrate
Content licensing restrictions limit what agents can store or redistribute

security_score_components.security_notes: Strong enterprise security posture; OAuth2 with scopes; SOC2 compliance; content licensing enforced
